label: Lane C gap confirmed: Lane A 5-dim, sk-doc DQI, and manual_testing_playbook all measure static artifact shape, none measure runtime utilization
D1 Routing/Activation Accuracy (recall, precision/false-activation, abstention, near-neighbor confusion) maps to BFCL relevance-detection + MetaTool tool-usage-awareness
D2 Unprompted Reference/Asset Discovery = IR retrieval metrics (Hit@k, Recall@k, MRR, nDCG) over the skill's references using RESOURCE_MAP as gold; ON_DEMAND load-all is a precision hazard
D3 Efficiency/Bottlenecks = tool-calls/tokens-to-resource + trajectory length + activation context cost; maps to AgentBench/tau-bench step metrics and progressive-disclosure goal

D4 Usefulness via skill-on/off ablation = causal utility (quality/success/efficiency delta minus context cost); reuse eval_run_ablation, Lane A Mode 2A A/B, Lane B llm grader, MT-Bench/G-Eval judge canon
D5 Structural Connectivity (orphan refs, dead router keys, intent->resource coverage); deterministic; load_if_available silently no-ops dead keys so it must be an explicit hard gate
Proposed utility-first weighting D4 0.30/D1 0.25/D2 0.20/D3 0.15/D5 0.10 with connectivity as hard gate, parallel to but distinct from Lane A weights
Lane C fits the existing three-seam architecture: candidate=skill-under-test, dispatcher=dispatch-model.cjs, scorer=new skill-benchmark scorer calling advisor_recommend/advisor_validate for D1

Fixtures auto-derivable from the skill's own WHEN TO USE / When NOT to Use / triggers / RESOURCE_MAP (positive, negative, near-neighbor prompts + gold task->reference map); deterministic vs graded split keeps loop cheap

Rename surface deep-agent-improvement -> deep-improvement is broad (skill dir, frontmatter/triggers/keywords, commands, agent + .claude/.codex/.gemini mirrors, skill-graph.json, descriptions.json, loop_type namespaces); needs a dedicated mapping iteration
